step1.tip: Choose a clear, descriptive project title and provide a detailed summary. This helps creators and team members quickly understand your project's goals.

step2.tip: Choose a start and end date for your project. This helps creators and team members quickly understand your project's goals.

loading_project_form_description: Please wait while we load everything you need to create your project. This should only take a moment.
loading_project_details_description: Please wait while we load the project details. This should only take a moment.
invite_message_default:
Hi {{creator}},

I’d like to invite you to take a look at the project we’ve posted. If you’re available and interested, feel free to submit a proposal. 

Best regards,
no_creators_description: No creators found for this project. Please try again later.
no_hired_creators_description: You haven't hired any creators for this project yet. Review proposals to start hiring.
